name: sim_weyl_a2_su3_coupling
scope_note: Coupling probe: W(A2) Weyl group <-> SU(3) G-tower. W(A2)=S3 IS the Weyl group of SU(3): acts on 2D weight space, permutes 6 roots, acts on Cartan subalgebra. Tests: Gell-Mann matrices, Weyl-Cartan action, root generator pairs, S3 orbit structure, Clifford reflections, Cayley/root graph isomorphism. z3 UNSAT: reflection cannot simultaneously fix and negate a root.

pytorch.reason: Gell-Mann matrices as complex128 tensors; verify traceless+Hermitian; compute commutators to verify su(3) algebra; S3 permutation matrices acting on Cartan elements; verify Weyl action stays in Cartan subalgebra

pyg.reason: not used in this Weyl-SU3 coupling probe; deferred to multi-shell coexistence

z3.reason: UNSAT: simple reflection σ_α maps positive root α to -α AND maps another positive root β to a positive root (not -β) — structurally impossible since σ_α maps exactly α→-α and permutes all other positive roots or sends them to negative roots

cvc5.reason: not used in this Weyl-SU3 coupling probe; deferred to proof-layer expansion

sympy.reason: Symbolic Gell-Mann matrices as 3x3 complex matrices; verify commutation relations [T_a, T_b] = i*f_abc*T_c; Cartan subalgebra span{λ3,λ8}; symbolic permutation action on diag(a,b,-a-b)

clifford.reason: A2 root vectors in Cl(2,0); Weyl reflections as Clifford sandwich products; grade-1 roots map to grade-1 roots under all S3 actions; grade-2 bivector encodes the 2D weight space orientation of SU(3)

geomstats.reason: not used in this Weyl-SU3 coupling probe; deferred to geometry layer

e3nn.reason: not used in this Weyl-SU3 coupling probe; deferred to equivariant layer

rustworkx.reason: W(A2) Cayley graph (6 nodes, S3 structure); SU(3) adjoint representation weight diagram (8 nodes: 6 roots + 2 Cartan); verify S3 acts on root nodes of adjoint weight diagram by permutation — graph homomorphism

xgi.reason: Hyperedge encoding: {λ1,λ2,λ3} as isospin SU(2) subalgebra hyperedge; {λ4,λ5,λ6,λ7,λ8} as remaining generators hyperedge; 3-way hyperedge {α-root-pair, β-root-pair, γ-root-pair} for W(A2) orbit

toponetx.reason: not used in this Weyl-SU3 coupling probe; deferred to topology layer

gudhi.reason: not used in this Weyl-SU3 coupling probe; deferred to persistence layer

P1_pytorch_gellmann_traceless_hermitian.reason: All 8 Gell-Mann matrices are traceless (tr=0) and Hermitian (λ=λ†); required generators of su(3)

P2_pytorch_weyl_action_stays_in_cartan.reason: S3 permutation of diag(a,b,-a-b): all permuted vectors still sum to 0 — Weyl action preserves Cartan subalgebra

P3_pytorch_root_generators_single_entry.reason: Root generators E_12, E_13, E_23 are single-entry matrices; 6 root generators pair into 3 W(A2)-related pairs

P4_sympy_su3_commutator_cartan_root.reason: Commutator [λ3, λ1] = 2i*λ2 verifies root structure: Cartan acts on root generators by eigenvalue (weight)

P5_sympy_permutation_preserves_traceless.reason: S3 permutation of Cartan element diag(a,b,-a-b) stays traceless; Weyl action preserved Cartan subalgebra symbolically

P6_clifford_a2_roots_reflect_to_roots.reason: Clifford reflections in Cl(2,0) map all 6 A2 roots to other A2 roots — W(A2) acts on root system via Clifford sandwich

P7_rustworkx_cayley_and_root_diagram_iso.reason: W(A2) Cayley graph and SU(3) root diagram both have 6 nodes and are strongly connected under S3 action

P8_xgi_su3_subalgebra_hyperedges.reason: XGI hyperedges: 3 SU(2) subalgebras (isospin/U/V-spin) + 3 W(A2) root-pair orbits encode SU(3) structure

N1_pytorch_su3_has_8_generators_not_3.reason: SU(3) has exactly 8 generators (Gell-Mann matrices), not 3 like SU(2); rank-2 vs rank-1 Lie algebra

N2_pytorch_weyl_a2_order_not_8.reason: W(A2)=S3 has order 6, not 8; contrast with W(B2)=Dih4 of order 8

N3_z3_unsat_reflection_cannot_fix_and_ne.reason: UNSAT: σ_α fixes α (root_fixed=T) AND negates α (root_negated=T) AND fixed≠negated — for nonzero root, structurally impossible

N4_sympy_cartan_doesnt_commute_with_root.reason: [λ3,λ1] ≠ 0: Cartan generator λ3 does NOT commute with root generator λ1; Cartan acts nontrivially (eigenvalue = weight)

N5_clifford_reflection_nonzero.reason: Clifford reflection of nonzero root vector gives nonzero result (=-α); reflections are invertible

B1_pytorch_weyl_faithful_on_asymmetric_c.reason: S3 acts faithfully on asymmetric Cartan element: all 6 permutations give distinct results

B2_pytorch_generic_weight_trivial_stabil.reason: Generic Cartan element has trivial stabilizer in W(A2): only identity fixes it (Weyl group acts freely on regular elements)

B3_sympy_regular_weight_orbit_size_6.reason: Regular weight (1,-1,0) under W(A2)=S3 has orbit of size 6 — full transitive orbit (regular = trivial stabilizer)

B4_rustworkx_adjoint_8_weights_6_root_su.reason: SU(3) adjoint rep: 8 weights total (6 roots + 2 Cartan zeros); W(A2) root subgraph has 6 nodes with S3 permutation edges

B5_xgi_root_pair_orbits.reason: XGI: 3 root-pair hyperedges {α,-α} are the 3 W(A2) orbits on the set of root pairs (S3 acts on these 3 orbits by permutation)

B6_sympy_nonidentity_weyl_acts_nontrivia.reason: Non-identity Weyl element (12) maps (1,-1/2,-1/2) to (-1/2,1,-1/2): distinct Cartan elements — Weyl action is nontrivial
